title: Pastel Balloon Arch Kit, 160Pcs 5 12 18 Inch Pastel Multicolour Colourful Rainbow Party Balloons Garland for Birthday Baby Shower Congratulations Graduation Anniversary Party Decorations Supplies
features: Pastel Balloons Garland Arch Kit: You will get 160pcs latex balloons. 10 x 18 inch Balloons (Blue*2, Green*2, Purple*2, Pink*2, Yellow*2) , 100 x 12 inch Balloons (Blue*20, Green*20, Purple*20, Pink*20, Yellow*20) , 50 x 5 inch Balloons (Blue*10, Green*10, Purple*10, Pink*10, Yellow*10) , balloons strip 1pc, glue dot 100pcs, 10m white ribbon
Premium Material: Our balloons are made of latex. Each of these latex balloons is in a brighter color and 20% thicker than normal latex balloons, durable and not easy to burst

Easy Assembly: This rich balloon arch kit include balloon strips, glue dots and ribbons to help you quickly assemble your balloon garland arch. Simply inflate your balloons and secure to the balloon strip. recommend various colors and blow up different sizes, then use the glue dots can fix the additional balloons where you want for perfect look. You can DIY any shape what you like, then creat great party atmosphere

Suitable for All Occasions: These pastel rainbow balloons come in full, vibrant colours and add infinite vibrancy to your party. These balloons is suitable for any party event such as birthday party decorations, baby shower for boys and girls, birthday balloons for women men, photo backdrop, also wedding, anniversary, engagement, hen party bachelorette, graduation, carnivals, gaming, confirmation decorations, all festivals and parties
Warm Tips: They can be filled with air or helium and are recommended for use with balloon pumps. Please do not overfill the balloon so they don't pop
